reviews.comment:
Buen lugar...hay lavadero de auto...mecanico....es muy completo. Si sos socio podes hacer la pre vtv te revisan el auto antes de ir a la vtv.

(Translated by Google)
Good place...there's a car wash...a mechanic...it's very complete. If you're a member, you can get your car pre-inspection done; they check it before you go for the official inspection.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReVByb2xBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay que tener suerte, porque si caes en horario de cambio de turno (+-14hs sábado) podes comerte una hora de demora. Otra gran macana es que NO ORDENAN LA FILA y puede ser violento ver cómo se te cuelan los vivos caraduras y a los de la estación les importa cero. Nadie pone orden. Inútil reclamar. Se ríen. En cuanto al servicio de lavado, no son detallistas y es caro incluso para socios ACA.

(Translated by Google)
You have to be lucky, because if you arrive during the shift change (around 2 PM on Saturdays), you could face an hour's delay. Another big problem is that they DON'T ORGANIZE THE LINE, and it can be infuriating to see people cutting in line while the station staff couldn't care less. Nobody enforces the rules. Complaining is pointless. They just laugh. As for the car wash service, they're not meticulous, and it's expensive even for ACA members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNThfWmVREAE
